mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id AS userId, name FROM league_deck_set WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY id
SELECT id, user_id AS userId, name FROM league_deck_set WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}

SELECT s.id AS setId, s.name AS setName, d1.id AS deckSlot1Id, d2.id AS deckSlot2Id, d1.name AS deckSlot1Name, d2.name AS deckSlot2Name FROM league_deck_set s JOIN deck d1 ON d1.league_set_id = s.id AND d1.league_slot = 1 JOIN deck d2 ON d2.league_set_id = s.id AND d2.league_slot = 2 WHERE s.id = #{id} AND s.user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: UPDATE league_deck_set SET name = #{name} WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM league_deck_set WHERE id = #{id} AND user_id = #{userId}
